name: Dependency Update Check (npm)
description: Write an npm outdated report for a project on a schedule.

parameters.label: Project path
parameters.help: Folder containing package.json (avoid spaces in the path).

parameters.label: Report file path
parameters.help: Where to write the outdated report. Note: npm outdated exits non-zero when updates exist, so the run shows as failed exactly when there is something to update.
